rationale: In the citing paper, Bronnenberg, Dhar, and Dube (2007a) is cited mainly in grouped literature lists as an example of prior spatial modeling work on regional brand performance. It is used to motivate the research gap (prior studies model spatial effects but do not deliver dynamic advertising budget optimization), and appears in a comparative table of prior studies. The citing paper does not build directly on this specific paper's data, measures, mechanism, or empirical design, and no distinct argument hinges on it alone.
